label: Invalid sequence
description: Sequence contains non-canonical amino-acid symbols or unparseable characters that prevent pipeline scoring.
example: Sequence contains 'X' at position 5 and 'B' at position 12.

label: Length outside range
description: Sequence length falls below minimum or above maximum configured filter bounds.
example: Length 6 outside filter range [8, 50].

label: Patent proximity
description: Sequence similarity to a patented or known AMP reference exceeds the configured novelty cutoff.
example: Nearest reference similarity 0.91 exceeds novelty cutoff 0.70.

label: Activity score below threshold
description: The pipeline activity score falls below the configured minimum gate threshold, indicating low predicted antimicrobial potential.
example: Activity score 0.42 below minimum threshold 0.50.

label: Safety score below threshold
description: The pipeline safety score falls below the configured minimum, indicating elevated predicted hemolysis or cytotoxicity risk.
example: Safety score 0.31 below minimum threshold 0.50 (driven by high hemolysis proxy 0.89).

label: Novelty score below threshold
description: The novelty score falls below the configured minimum, indicating the candidate is too similar to known sequences in the novelty reference database.
example: Novelty score 0.35 below minimum threshold 0.40 (near-duplicate of known AMP).

label: Synthesis feasibility low
description: The synthesis feasibility score falls below the configured viability threshold, indicating challenging solid-phase peptide synthesis.
example: Synthesis score 0.20 — multiple Trp residues with oxidation risk, aggregation propensity above threshold.

label: Scorer disagreement high
description: Disagreement between independent scorers exceeds the configured maximum tolerance, indicating uncertainty about the candidate profile.
example: Scorer disagreement 0.72 exceeds maximum tolerance 0.50.

label: Ensemble gate below threshold
description: The composite ensemble score falls below the configured synthesis gate threshold, combining multiple signal dimensions.
example: Ensemble score 0.55 below synthesis gate threshold 0.65.

label: Simulation uncertainty high
description: Simulation proxy uncertainty exceeds the configured threshold (0.5), preventing simulation outputs from affecting selection.
example: Max simulation uncertainty 0.92 exceeds 0.5 threshold — simulation outputs are informational only.

label: Near-duplicate of selected candidate
description: Candidate was removed during diversity selection because it exceeds the similarity threshold to an already-selected candidate.
example: Sequence similarity 0.82 to already-selected candidate WAVE0.5-003 exceeds diversity threshold 0.70.

label: Per-family cap reached
description: Candidate belongs to a scaffold family that has already reached its maximum panel allocation.
example: Family SEED-012 has reached its cap of 2 panel slots; candidate SEED-012_VAR_005 excluded.

label: Budget or scope limitation
description: Candidate excluded because panel size or budget constraints prevent testing all qualifying candidates.
example: Panel budget limited to 24 candidates; lowest-ranked qualifying candidate excluded.

label: Expert reviewer rejected
description: A qualified domain expert reviewed the candidate evidence package and recommended against proceeding.
example: Expert reviewer: 'Candidate shows no mechanism novelty — insufficient evidence to warrant synthesis.'

label: Safety review concern
description: A human safety reviewer flagged the candidate based on structural alerts, dual-use potential, or toxicity profile not captured by computational safety scoring.
example: Safety reviewer: 'Candidate contains a predicted hemolytic motif that the safety scorer is known to miss (melittin-class blind spot).'

label: Insufficient evidence
description: The candidate evidence package does not meet the reviewer's minimum requirements for progression — missing data, weak signal, or unresolved uncertainty.
example: Reviewer: 'No hemolysis data; safety score is based on proxy features only. Recommend hold until selectivity benchmark is available.'

label: Lab-confirmed inactive
description: Candidate was tested in an approved assay and confirmed inactive (MIC above cutoff or no observable antimicrobial activity).
example: MIC > 128 ug/mL against E. coli ATCC 25922, S. aureus ATCC 29213, and P. aeruginosa ATCC 27853.

label: Lab-confirmed toxic
description: Candidate passed computational safety gates but showed hemolysis or cytotoxicity in assay.
example: 100% hemolysis at 50 uM (RBC assay) — computational safety score was 0.85 (false negative).

label: Assay control failure
description: Assay batch failed positive or negative controls, invalidating all results. Archived for transparency but flagged as non-interpretable.
example: Positive control (melittin) showed only 12% hemolysis at 50 uM — batch invalidated.

label: Synthesis failure
description: Candidate could not be synthesized at sufficient purity or yield for assay testing.
example: SPPS failed at residue 7 (Trp aggregation); maximum achievable purity 65% after 3 attempts.

label: Superseded by better candidate
description: Candidate was replaced by a later candidate that scores higher or addresses a limitation of the original selection.
example: Superseded by WAVE0.5-031 which achieves 0.88 ensemble score (vs 0.76) with improved safety profile.

label: Withdrawn by team
description: Candidate was withdrawn from consideration by the research team for non-technical reasons (scope change, strategic reprioritisation, partner feedback).
example: Withdrawn after partner requested focus on lower-hemolysis families only.
